commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Sheba, and Dedan, and the merchants of Tarshish, with all its villages, shall say unto you, Have you come to take plunder. have you gathered your company to take a prey. to carry away silver and gold, to take away cattle and goods, to take a great spoil. Septuagint, "Carthage, and all their villages. "The merchants or naval forces of Cambyses spurred him forward, (see Psalm lxxvii. ) as well as the Arabs, Cuthites, 1 Esdras iv.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
